zh.Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯
zh.Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾利朋
zh.Sawley, Ripon, West Riding,Yorkshire, En: 英國英格蘭越可爾薩利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Norton於大約1360年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Adam Norton28歲，母親Alice Nunwicke19歲。他於1385年與Katherine Manningham在英國越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年12月20日在英國越可爾諾頓享年61歲，埋葬在英國越可爾沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Norton于大约1360年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Adam Norton28岁，母亲Alice Nunwicke19岁。他于1385年与Katherine Manningham在英国越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年12月20日在英国越可爾諾頓享年61岁，埋葬在英国越可爾沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Norton was born about 1360, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Adam Norton, was 28 and his mother, Alice Nunwicke, was 19. He married Katherine Manningham in 1385, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 December 1420, in Norton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Wath, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Norton est né environ 1360, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam Norton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Nunwicke, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Manningham en 1385, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1420, à Norton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Norton um 1360 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Norton 28 und seine Mutter Alice Nunwicke 19. Er hat 1385 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Katherine Manningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Dezember 1420 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Norton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Wath, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Norton è nato il circa 1360 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Adam Norton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Alice Nunwicke, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Manningham nel 1385, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 dicembre 1420, nel Norton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Wath, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Nortonが約1360年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam Nortonは28歳，母Alice Nunwickeは19歳であった。1385年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでKatherine Manninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1420年12月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアノートンで61歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Norton(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Norton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Nunwicke(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Katherine Manningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 12월 20일 영국 요르크실르 노르턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Norton nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Norton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Nunwicke, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Manningham em 1385, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1420, em Norton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Norton родился около 1360 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam Norton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Nunwicke, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Manningham в 1385 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 декабря 1420 г. в местности нортон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности ват, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Norton nació aproximadamente 1360, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Norton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Nunwicke, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Katherine Manningham en 1385, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1420, en Norton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
